TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tom_Brennan, title = Tom_Brennan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tom_Brennan} }

S.FORM: Tom Brennan sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1930, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 8, Tom Brennan, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1990) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Tom Brennan sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1930, ryax sa tay 6 nqu tay 8, Tom Brennan, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1990) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tom βrennan s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tom βrennan, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
